name: End-to-End Control Plane Demo Flow
scenario: Procurement agent governed from intake to safety-reviewed simulated execution

steps.name: Use case intake
steps.output: risk level, lifecycle gate status, next actions

steps.name: Agent registration and evidence linkage
steps.output: agent record, version record, evidence references

steps.name: RBAC and tenant boundary check
steps.output: role, tenant, capability, environment, and autonomy decision

steps.name: Approval workflow when needed
steps.output: approval request, reviewer decision, evidence linkage

steps.name: Provider route governance
steps.output: provider/model route decision, cost estimate, required controls

steps.name: Prompt/response safety review
steps.output: safety decision, blockers, controls, audit summary

steps.name: Dry-run connector execution
steps.output: dry-run run record and simulated result

success_criteria: Every material decision is deterministic and inspectable.
Every risky action has policy, security, approval, evidence, and audit context.
Live execution remains disabled until future production gates are explicitly implemented.
